name: VK-N01 New Application
subject: New Loan Application: {{ doc.name }} — {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }}
message:
A new loan application has been received.

Applicant: {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }}
Amount: KES {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.loan_amount or 0) }}
Application: {{ doc.name }}
Stage: {{ doc.vk_loan_stage or 'Draft' }}

Please log in to complete KYC verification or review the application.

name: VK-N02 KYC Verified
subject: Your Documents Have Been Verified
message:
Dear {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }},

Thank you for submitting your documents. We have successfully verified your identity and employment details.

We are now reviewing your application and will be in touch shortly with a decision.

name: VK-N03 KYC Rejected
subject: Document Verification — Action Required
message:
Dear {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }},

We were unable to verify your documents for the following reason:

{{ doc.vk_rejection_reason }}

Please resubmit the correct documents via the portal or contact us directly. Your application will resume once the documents are re-verified.

name: VK-N04 Loan Approved
subject: Loan Approved — {{ doc.name }}
message:
Dear {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }},

Congratulations! Your loan application has been approved.

Approved Amount: KES {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.loan_amount or 0) }}

A framework agreement will be sent to you shortly for signing. Please upload the signed copy via the portal or deliver it to our office.

name: VK-N05 Application Declined
subject: Your Loan Application — {{ doc.name }}
message:
Dear {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }},

We regret to inform you that your loan application could not be approved at this time.

Reason: {{ doc.vk_rejection_reason or 'Please contact us for details.' }}

We encourage you to stay in touch and reapply in the future.

name: VK-N06 Agreement Active
subject: Framework Agreement Signed — {{ doc.name }}
message:
The framework agreement for loan application {{ doc.name }} has been signed and is now active.

Borrower: {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }}
Amount: KES {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.loan_amount or 0) }}

The application has advanced to Pending Disbursement. Please proceed with fund transfer.

name: VK-N07 Pending Disbursement
subject: Disbursement Ready — {{ doc.name }}
message:
Loan {{ doc.name }} for {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }} is ready for disbursement.

Amount: KES {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.loan_amount or 0) }}
Due Date: {{ doc.vk_payday_date or 'TBD' }}

Please transfer the funds and record the M-Pesa confirmation code in the system.

name: VK-N08 Loan Disbursed
subject: Your Loan Has Been Disbursed — {{ doc.name }}
message:
Dear {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }},

Your loan has been disbursed successfully to your M-Pesa account.

Amount: KES {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.loan_amount or 0) }}
Repayment Due Date: {{ doc.vk_payday_date or 'See your agreement' }}

Please ensure repayment is made on or before the due date to maintain your credit standing.

name: VK-N14 Loan Repaid
subject: Loan Fully Repaid — Thank You
message:
Dear {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }},

We have received your full repayment for loan application {{ doc.name }}. Thank you!

Your account is now in good standing. You are welcome to apply for a new loan at any time.

name: VK-N16 Fast-Lane Confirm Required
subject: Fast-Lane Confirm Required — {{ doc.name }}
message:
A repeat borrower loan is awaiting your confirmation.

Borrower: {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }}
Amount: KES {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.loan_amount or 0) }}
Category: {{ doc.vk_borrower_category or 'N/A' }}
Due Date: {{ doc.vk_payday_date or 'TBD' }}

Please open the application to confirm or decline: /app/loan-application/{{ doc.name }}

name: VK-N17 Refinancing Requested
subject: Refinancing Request — {{ doc.name }}
message:
A refinancing request has been received from {{ doc.applicant_name or doc.applicant }}.

Top-Up Requested: KES {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.vk_top_up_amount or 0) }}
Original Loan: {{ doc.vk_refinancing_of_loan or doc.vk_refinancing_of or 'N/A' }}

Please review the application and approve or decline.
